5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (lib/restore.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.backitup/blob/master/io-package.json).

5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (lib/scripts/36-grafana.js, lib/scripts/42-javascripts.js). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.
